name: Netsmart myUnity Home Health EHR API
what_it_does: Netsmart myUnity REST API for post-acute care EHR platform serving home health, hospice, behavioral health, and long-term care providers. Enables AI agents to access patient clinical records and care plans, retrieve visit scheduling and care coordination data, manage home health episode billing and claims, access outcome and quality measure data, integrate with payer systems for authorization and eligibility, and connect care data across behavioral health and post-acute continuum.
use_cases: Retrieving home health patient records and care plans from clinical coordination agents
Managing visit scheduling and care team assignments from home health operations agents
Accessing billing and claims data from revenue cycle management agents
Integrating outcome data with quality reporting systems from analytics agents
not_for: Acute hospital care without post-acute continuum focus
Primary care without behavioral health or home health workflow
Non-clinical workforce management without clinical EHR integration
best_when: A home health agency, hospice, or behavioral health organization using Netsmart myUnity wants AI agents to automate care coordination, scheduling, billing workflows, and outcome reporting.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Patient clinical data is protected health information. All agent access must be covered by BAA. Clinical decision support automation requires appropriate clinical oversight and validation.

auth.notes: Netsmart uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials with patient-level access control. SMART on FHIR available for interoperability. Scopes control clinical, billing, and scheduling data access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — post-acute care EHR enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-agency pricing; enterprise contracts for health systems
pricing.notes: Overland Park, Kansas. Founded 1968. Market leader for behavioral health EHR. myUnity platform for post-acute and home-based care. 550,000+ clinicians on platform. Acquired CareFabric/Allscripts home health division. Major LTPAC market presence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enterprise SLA-based

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: All agent access to patient PHI requires BAA and appropriate access controls
No public MCP server — REST API with enterprise partner program
No webhooks — requires polling for updated patient records
SMART on FHIR available for interoperability — preferred for clinical integrations
Behavioral health data has extra sensitivity beyond HIPAA — 42 CFR Part 2 may apply
Post-acute billing complexity — home health episode billing requires domain expertise
agent_readiness.security_notes: Patient PHI and behavioral health data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Behavioral health extra protections (42 CFR Part 2) may apply.

security_score_components.security_notes: Patient PHI and behavioral health data. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. 42 CFR Part 2 behavioral health protections.
